name: Earth Dunk Physics Arcade Game
description: Earth Dunk is a fun and addictive physics-based HTML5 arcade game built with Construct 3. Control the rotating Earth ball and perfectly dunk it into moving rings to score points. Collect stars for bonus rewards and survive as long as possible in this endless challenge! With smooth physics gameplay, satisfying sound effects, and beautiful Day & Night themes, Earth Dunk is perfect for web portals, mobile browsers, and casual gaming platforms.
instructions: Tap to control the Earth ball Aim carefully and dunk the Earth through the rings
